raw_source.title: [居家] 头部币所诚聘 java/go 架构  薪资open 不卡涨幅
raw_source.body:
公司/团队介绍
头部币所web3团队 中间件和架构 java或者go 
薪资福利待遇
薪资open 不卡涨幅

联系方式：VX：ljlljl269 Email：[baron.lee@interwinee.com](mailto:baron.lee@interwinee.com)


## 岗位要求、职责
Job responsibilities:

Responsible for Middleware etcd related development, Performance optimization, problem fixing, operation and maintenance
Responsible for the development, maintenance, continuous optimization, and Line of Business Q & A of internal Java frameworks (based on Spring)
Help business parties solve technical problems and use technology to promote business development.
Job requirements:

Proficient in Java and Golang concurrent programming, familiar with high concurrency, distributed communication, storage and other related technologies.
Bachelor's degree or above, with more than 3 years of relevant work experience.
Familiar with Linux operating system and open source Middleware software.
Familiarity with Middleware such as etcd and Nacos, and relevant maintenance and optimization experience is preferred
Familiar with gRPC framework, experience in gRPC framework development and optimization is preferred.
Proficient in common troubleshooting tools, such as arthas, tcpdump, Linux commands, etc
Open source contributors or technical bloggers with long-term accumulation are preferred.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
